name: Generate and email invoices, quotes, and receipts from webhook JSON

parameters.content:
## Generate and email invoices, quotes, and receipts from webhook JSON

### Who is it for
Anyone with a system that already knows about orders — an online store, CRM, booking tool, or internal app — who wants professional billing documents sent to customers without building PDF infrastructure.

### How it works
1. Your system POSTs order JSON to the webhook (documentType picks invoice, quote, estimate, receipt, or proforma)
2. The workflow builds a styled document with line items, tax, and totals
3. The Acrewity community node renders it to PDF
4. Gmail delivers the PDF to the customer within seconds
5. Your system receives a JSON confirmation with the document number

### How to set up
1. Install the verified community node @acrewity/n8n-nodes-acrewity and add your Acrewity API credential (free key at acrewity.com, 100 free credits/month)
2. Connect your Gmail credential to the email node
3. Edit the Workflow configuration node: company name, logo, default tax rate, currency
4. Activate and POST to the webhook URL

### Sample payload
{
  "documentType": "invoice",
  "documentNumber": "INV-2026-001",
  "customerName": "John Smith",
  "customerEmail": "john@example.com",
  "dueDate": "2026-08-15",
  "taxRate": 0.13,
  "items": [{"name": "Widget", "quantity": 2, "price": 9.99}]
}

### How to customize
Document layout lives in Build document HTML (marked CHANGE ME), email copy in the Gmail node. Add a Drive or Slack node after Gmail to archive or notify.

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Build document HTML').item.json.emailSubject }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Build document HTML').item.json.customerName }},

Your {{ $('Build document HTML').item.json.documentType }} {{ $('Build document HTML').item.json.documentNumber }} is attached as a PDF.

If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

Best regards

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, documentType: $('Build document HTML').item.json.documentType, documentNumber: $('Build document HTML').item.json.documentNumber, emailedTo: $('Build document HTML').item.json.customerEmail } }}

parameters.content:
**1. Intake and configuration**
Your store, CRM, or app POSTs order JSON here. Company details and defaults live in the Workflow configuration node.

**2. Build and convert**
One code node handles all five document types (invoice, quote, estimate, receipt, proforma). The Acrewity node renders the PDF.

**3. Deliver and confirm**
Gmail sends the PDF to the customer; the caller gets a JSON confirmation with the document number instead of a raw file.
